title: The Weekly Challenge - 211
task1_desc: You are given a matrix `m x n`.
task1_body:
You are given a matrix `m x n`. Write a script to find out if the given matrix is `Toeplitz Matrix`. > A matrix is Toeplitz if every diagonal from top-left to bottom-right has the same elements.
#### Example 1 Input: @matrix = [ [4, 3, 2, 1], [5, 4, 3, 2], [6, 5, 4, 3], ] Output: true #### Example 2 Input: @matrix = [ [1, 2, 3], [3, 2, 1], ] Output: false
task2_desc: You are given an array of integers.
task2_body:
You are given an array of integers. Write a script to find out if the given can be split into two separate arrays whose average are the same. #### Example 1: Input: @nums = (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8) Output: true We can split the given array into (1, 4, 5, 8) and (2, 3, 6, 7). The average of the two arrays are the same i.e. 4.5. #### Example 2: Input: @list = (1, 3) Output: false
Last date to submit the solution **23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 9th April 2023**.
